purpose: Identify a safe source route for pre-2016 historic MP division records before merging historic records into the main vote index.

candidates.name: ParlParse raw data
candidates.known_value: ParlParse describes itself as structured versions of publicly available UK Parliament data and the engine behind TheyWorkForYou and Public Whip.
candidates.likely_date_coverage: potentially historic; exact division coverage must be inspected
candidates.can_identify_mp_consistently: likely, because member files include current and past members, affiliations and constituencies
candidates.can_provide_division_date_title_url_side: unknown until the division data shape is inspected
candidates.licensing_or_attribution: must check mySociety / TheyWorkForYou terms before publishing derived data
candidates.bulk_suitability: strong candidate; TheyWorkForYou API docs recommend raw data for analysis over long periods
candidates.risk: raw data may need parsing and schema inspection before use

candidates.name: TheyWorkForYou API
candidates.known_value: The API can query the TheyWorkForYou database and has documented JSON/XML outputs.
candidates.likely_date_coverage: unknown for complete vote history; API docs point to raw data for long-period bulk analysis
candidates.can_provide_division_date_title_url_side: unclear; vote-specific bulk extraction is not the best fit based on docs
candidates.licensing_or_attribution: API key, usage terms, pricing and attribution requirements apply
candidates.bulk_suitability: weak for this use case; better for lookup than full historic vote indexing
candidates.risk: paid/keyed API and not recommended for long-period bulk analysis
candidates.verdict: use only for identity/helping metadata unless raw data route fails

candidates.name: Public Whip
candidates.source_type: historic voting analysis site / possible source data
candidates.known_value: Public Whip tracks UK parliamentary votes and is connected historically with TheyWorkForYou / ParlParse tooling.
candidates.likely_date_coverage: potentially useful for historic votes; exact accessible data route must be inspected
candidates.can_identify_mp_consistently: likely, but source shape must be checked
candidates.can_provide_division_date_title_url_side: possible, but not confirmed by this report
candidates.licensing_or_attribution: must inspect terms / data licence before use
candidates.bulk_suitability: unknown until source shape and licence are checked
candidates.risk: may be web-page-first rather than clean data-first; avoid broad scraping
candidates.verdict: second candidate after ParlParse raw data

candidates.name: Official historic Hansard / Parliament archive material
candidates.known_value: Official historic Hansard exists, but division/member-vote extraction shape is not yet known for this project.
candidates.likely_date_coverage: historic; exact Commons division-list coverage must be inspected
candidates.can_provide_division_date_title_url_side: unknown; may require text parsing rather than structured vote rows
candidates.licensing_or_attribution: official reuse terms must be checked
candidates.bulk_suitability: unclear; likely harder than ParlParse if the data is not already structured as division rows
candidates.risk: could become a parsing project rather than a simple source integration
candidates.verdict: official fallback candidate, but not the fastest route
